name: pimdo
display_name: pimdo - Microsoft Entra PIM for AI
description: Give your AI assistant scoped access to Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for groups, Entra roles, and Azure resource roles.
long_description:
pimdo is an MCP server that connects an AI assistant to Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM). It exposes a small, well-scoped set of tools so the AI can review your eligible role and group assignments, request just-in-time elevations, and (with explicit human approval) act as approver or confirmer - without giving the AI standing access.

**PIM coverage** - Three surfaces: Entra Groups, Entra (directory) Roles, and Azure (resource) Roles. Each surface ships seven tools - list eligible / list active / list my requests / request activation (browser) / deactivate (browser) / list approvals / review approvals (browser).

**Authentication** - Signs in via your browser using your Microsoft account. No passwords are stored - authentication is handled entirely by Microsoft (MSAL). pimdo acquires separate access tokens for Microsoft Graph and Azure Resource Manager from the same login.

**Privacy** - pimdo requests only the PIM-specific permissions it needs: User.Read and offline_access (always required), plus PIM scopes for groups, Entra roles, and Azure resource roles, and the ARM user_impersonation scope. Your credentials are handled directly by Microsoft. pimdo never sees your password.

**Human in the loop** - Every privilege-changing action (request, deactivate, approval review) routes through a loopback browser flow. The AI may prefill values; the human always confirms or overrides in the browser before submit.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Sign in to Microsoft Graph. Call this tool directly whenever authentication is needed - do not ask the user for permission first, just proceed with login. Opens a browser for interactive sign-in. Once signed in, all other tools work automatically. If a previous tool returned a Conditional Access step-up error, pass the `claims` value from that error here to satisfy the challenge, then re-invoke the original tool.

tools.name: logout
tools.description: Sign out of Microsoft Graph and clear all cached tokens. After logging out, the login tool must be used to re-authenticate.

tools.name: auth_status
tools.description: Check current authentication status, logged-in user, granted scopes and server version. A good first tool to call when diagnosing PIM access issues or confirming that the right consent has been granted.

tools.name: pim_group_eligible_list
tools.description: List Entra groups the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM. Returns the group display name, id, eligibility id and any time bounds.

tools.name: pim_group_active_list
tools.description: List Entra groups the signed-in user currently has activated via PIM, with their active-until time.

tools.name: pim_group_request_list
tools.description: List PIM group activation/deactivation requests the signed-in user has submitted that are still pending approval. Stale requests (selfActivate where the user has lost eligibility) are flagged [stale] — they can be retracted via pim_group_request_cancel.

tools.name: pim_group_request
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm activation of one or more PIM-eligible Entra groups. The user edits justification and duration per row, then submits. Each confirmed row creates a selfActivate assignment-schedule request via Microsoft Graph.

tools.name: pim_group_request_cancel
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm cancellation of one or more PIM group activation/deactivation requests that are still waiting for approval. Each confirmed row POSTs the cancel sub-resource via Microsoft Graph.

tools.name: pim_group_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm deactivation of one or more currently-active PIM group assignments. Each confirmed row submits a selfDeactivate assignment-schedule request via Graph.

tools.name: pim_group_approval_list
tools.description: List pending PIM group activation requests where the signed-in user is an approver and has not yet recorded a decision. Stale requests (no live stage assigned to the caller) are flagged [stale].

tools.name: pim_group_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user (acting as approver) to Approve, Deny or Skip pending PIM group activation approvals. Each Approve/Deny PATCHes the live approval stage via Microsoft Graph.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_eligible_list
tools.description: List Entra (directory) roles the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM. Returns the role display name, role definition id, eligibility id, directory scope and any time bounds.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_active_list
tools.description: List Entra (directory) roles the signed-in user currently has activated via PIM, with their active-until time.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_request_list
tools.description: List PIM Entra-role activation/deactivation requests the signed-in user has submitted that are still pending approval. Stale requests (selfActivate where the user has lost eligibility) are flagged [stale] — they can be retracted via pim_role_entra_request_cancel.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_request
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm activation of one or more PIM-eligible Entra (directory) roles. The user edits justification and duration per row, then submits. Each confirmed row creates a selfActivate role-assignment-schedule request via Microsoft Graph.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_request_cancel
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm cancellation of one or more PIM Entra-role activation/deactivation requests that are still waiting for approval. Each confirmed row POSTs the cancel sub-resource via Microsoft Graph.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm deactivation of one or more currently-active PIM Entra-role assignments. Each confirmed row submits a selfDeactivate role-assignment-schedule request via Graph.

tools.name: pim_role_entra_approval_list
tools.description: List pending PIM Entra-role activation requests where the signed-in user is an approver and has not yet recorded a decision. Stale requests (no live step assigned to the caller) are flagged [stale].

tools.name: pim_role_entra_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user (acting as approver) to Approve, Deny or Skip pending PIM Entra-role activation approvals. Each Approve/Deny PATCHes the live approval stage via the Microsoft Graph beta endpoint.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_eligible_list
tools.description: List Azure resource roles (subscriptions, resource groups, resources) the signed-in user is eligible to activate via PIM. Returns the role display name, role definition id, eligibility id, ARM scope and any time bounds.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_active_list
tools.description: List Azure resource roles the signed-in user currently has activated via PIM, with their active-until time.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_request_list
tools.description: List PIM Azure-role activation/deactivation requests the signed-in user has submitted. Does not filter by status - surface all visible schedule requests. Stale pending requests (SelfActivate where the user has lost eligibility) are flagged [stale] — they can be retracted via pim_role_azure_request_cancel.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_request
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm activation of one or more PIM-eligible Azure resource roles. The user edits justification and duration per row, then submits. Each confirmed row creates a SelfActivate role-assignment-schedule request via Azure Resource Manager.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_request_cancel
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm cancellation of one or more PIM Azure-role activation/deactivation requests that are still waiting for approval. Each confirmed row POSTs the cancel sub-resource via Azure Resource Manager.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_deactivate
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user to confirm deactivation of one or more currently-active PIM Azure-role assignments. Each confirmed row submits a SelfDeactivate role-assignment-schedule request via Azure Resource Manager.

tools.name: pim_role_azure_approval_list
tools.description: List PIM Azure-role activation requests where the signed-in user is an approver. Does not filter by status - surface the full approver-side queue. Stale requests (no live stage assigned to the caller) are flagged [stale].

tools.name: pim_role_azure_approval_review
tools.description: Open a browser form for the signed-in user (acting as approver) to Approve, Deny or Skip pending PIM Azure-role activation approvals. Each Approve/Deny submits the decision via Azure Resource Manager `/batch`.

debug.title: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug logging to stderr. Useful for troubleshooting authentication and API issues.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Microsoft Entra application (client) ID for authentication. Defaults to the shared multi-tenant pimdo-ts app registration. Override only if your organization requires a custom app registration with the PIM scopes pre-consented (see README).

tenant_id.title: Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID. Use 'common' for any work/school account, 'organizations' for work/school only, or a specific tenant GUID.
